## Vertiv Rack PDU Accessories

Enhance functionality, protection, and scalability with mounting kits, sensors, and cables. The Vertiv Rack PDU Accessories lineup provides a comprehensive range of components to extend the capabilities of your rack power distribution infrastructure, enabling customization, monitoring, and protection tailored to your specific needs.

### Accessory Categories

#### Mounting Kits
Simplify installation and ensure secure mounting of PDUs in any rack configuration:
- Horizontal and vertical mounting brackets
- Adjustable mounting kits for various rack depths
- Tool-free installation options
- Compatible with all major PDU form factors

#### Environmental Sensors
Extend monitoring capabilities beyond power to include critical environmental conditions:
- Temperature sensors for hot/cold aisle monitoring
- Humidity sensors to prevent condensation issues
- Leak detection sensors for water intrusion prevention
- Plug-and-play compatibility with Vertiv monitoring systems
- Support for multiple sensor types per monitoring unit

#### Power Cables
Ensure reliable power connections with a wide selection of cables:
- Various lengths to accommodate different rack layouts
- Multiple connector types (C13, C19, NEMA, IEC)
- High-current capacity options for demanding applications
- Color-coded cables for phase identification
- UL and CE certified for safety compliance

#### Upgradeable Monitoring Devices (IMD)
Enhance PDU capabilities with hot-swappable monitoring modules:
- Interchangeable Monitoring Devices (IMD) for adding metering or switching
- Upgrade from basic to metered to monitored functionality
- Field-upgradeable without replacing the entire PDU
- Support for local and remote monitoring
- Compatible with Vertiv rPDU Scanner app via VLC technology

#### Security Accessories
Protect your power infrastructure from unauthorized access:
- Lockable outlet covers
- Switch guard covers to prevent accidental power loss
- Cable management clips and ties
- PDU security locks

### Key Benefits

- **EXTENDED FUNCTIONALITY:** Transform basic PDUs into advanced metered or monitored units through simple module upgrades.
- **FLEXIBLE DEPLOYMENT:** Mounting kits accommodate any rack configuration, from 19-inch to 23-inch racks.
- **COMPREHENSIVE MONITORING:** Add environmental sensing to gain visibility into temperature, humidity, and potential leaks.
- **SCALABLE SOLUTIONS:** Start with basic PDUs and upgrade monitoring capabilities as needs evolve, protecting your investment.
- **ENHANCED PROTECTION:** Security accessories safeguard against accidental disconnections and unauthorized changes.
- **SIMPLIFIED MANAGEMENT:** Cable management accessories organize and protect power connections, improving airflow and maintenance access.

### Typical Use Cases

- **Data Center Expansion:** Add monitoring capabilities to existing PDUs without full replacement
- **Edge Deployments:** Install environmental sensors in remote locations to prevent climate-related failures
- **High-Density Racks:** Use color-coded cables and mounting kits for organized, phase-balanced power distribution
- **Compliance Requirements:** Meet regulatory requirements with certified accessories and detailed power monitoring
- **Legacy System Support:** Extend the life of older PDUs with modern monitoring and security accessories

### Compatibility

Vertiv Rack PDU Accessories are designed to work seamlessly with:
- Vertiv™ PowerIT™ rack PDUs
- Vertiv™ Geist™ rack PDUs
- Third-party PDUs (select accessories)
- Vertiv monitoring and management platforms

### Installation Support

- Pre-configured options for quick deployment
- Clear labeling and color-coding for easy identification
- Comprehensive documentation and compatibility guides
- Professional installation services available through Vertiv partners

The Vertiv Rack PDU Accessories portfolio provides the flexibility to build a power distribution solution that grows with your needs, from basic power delivery to advanced monitoring and management capabilities.
